# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Complete application stack for our infrastructure

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::CloudFormation::Stack
    Properties:
      TemplateURL: https://s3.amazonaws.com/your_bucket_name/vpc_template.json

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  VPC_IGW_Attachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VPCId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !GetAtt InternetGateway.GatewayId

  Subnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VPCId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24

  InternetAcl:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGatewayEgressOnlyInternetGateway

  NatInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt VPC.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1

  RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref NATGatewayRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1

  NatGatewayRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NATGateway Route Table

ResourcesForSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
  NATGatewayRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: RouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref NATGatewayRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !GetAtt NatInstance.NatGatewayId

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref Subnet1

  RDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      DBInstanceClass: db.t2.micro
      Engine: aurora
      MasterUsername: your_master_username
      MasterUserPassword: your_master_user_password
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !GetAtt EC2SecurityGroup.GroupId

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: your_bucket_name

  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupName: your_security_group_name
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  ALB:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Scheme: internet-facing
      SecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt EC2SecurityGroup.GroupId
      Subnets:
        - !Ref Subnet1

  ALBListener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !GetAtt ALB.ARN
      Port: '80'
      Protocol: HTTP
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: fixed-response
          FixedResponseConfig:
            ContentType: text/plain
            MessageBody: "Hello World"
